issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy path examples.

scenarios.name: Add tracing to a RAG pipeline using OpenAI
scenarios.rationale: Treatment calls weave.init and decorates pipeline steps with @weave.op() relying on automatic OpenAI tracing; baseline manually logs spans or uses a different observability tool without the auto-instrumentation pattern.

scenarios.name: Compare two prompt versions with an evaluation dataset
scenarios.rationale: Treatment subclasses weave.Model with predict decorated by @weave.op() and runs weave.Evaluation(dataset, scorers).evaluate(agent) for each version; baseline writes a custom loop without weave.Model versioning or Evaluation.
